div1.entryFree: Latter, last: to find both or bring your l. hazard back again, Merch. I, 1, 151. 'tis the rarest argument of wonder that hath shot out in our l. times, All's II, 3, 8; cf. to grace this l. age with noble deeds, H4A V, 1, 92; you, born in these l. times, H4A V, 1, 92. farewell the l. spring, H4A I, 2, 177 (== the end of the spring). at the l. day, H5 IV, 1, 143. and in his bosom spend my l. gasp, H6A II, 5, 38. and in devotion spend my l. days, H6C IV, 6, 43. these well express in thee thy l. spirits, Tim. V, 4, 74 (thy disposition at the end of life). the foulest best fits my l. part of life, Ant. IV, 6, 39. the two l. Per. III, 2, 29. the l. end == the end, the close: Tp. II, 1, 157. Wiv. I, 4, 9. LLL V, 2, 630. Mids. IV, 1, 223. All's II, 5, 31. H4A IV, 2, 85. H5 V, 2, 341.
